title: Why 'Invest Monthly' Costs You $23,000
hook: You've been told to invest a little each month — but Vanguard proved that habit is the wrong call two-thirds of the time.
angle: Lump sum investing beats dollar cost averaging 68% of the time across 100 years of market data — most people do DCA out of fear, not math
audience: People with savings sitting on the sidelines, or anyone who has heard 'just invest a little each month' as gospel
key_numbers: 68% of the time lump sum wins
markets rise 75% of all trading days
